name: Spring Surprise Chocolate Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Hershey's cocoa (or Hershey's European style cocoa)
A few drops of food coloring (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease muffin tins with vegetable oil and line with paper liners (about 2-1/2 inches in diameter).
2. In a medium bowl, mix together flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, water, oil, egg, and vanilla extract until smooth.
3. Fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with the chocolate mixture.
4. Prepare the surprise filling by mixing cream cheese, sugar, egg, coconut flakes, and optional food coloring in a separate bowl.
5. Spoon approximately 1 tablespoon of the surprise filling onto the top of each chocolate mixture.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean. Remove from pans and cool completely on a wire rack.
7. Garnish with additional coconut flakes, if desired. Serve and enjoy your Spring Surprise Chocolate Cupcakes!
